name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: 12 years ago, the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act was signed into law, however, many women are still being paid less than men for equal work.  Equal work should mean equal pay. Period.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: All that McNair achieved during his remarkable life resulted from hard work and dedication. He continues to teach us all to use our talents for the benefits of others. He gave the ultimate sacrifice, but left us with a legacy that will endure for generations to come.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Despite his many accomplishments, including earning a PhD in Physics from MIT at the age of 25, McNair attributed his professional success to the training and support he received as a student at North Carolina A&T, an Historically Black College.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Today we remember Lake City native Ronald E. McNair, who perished on the Space Shuttle Challenger 35 years ago. McNair accomplished much during his short life, including becoming the second African American astronaut to fly in space at 33 years of age.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: In the midst of this global pandemic, access to quality, affordable health care must be a top priority.  Today, President Biden will act to strengthen Medicaid and the ACA, including opening a special enrollment period on the ACA exchanges from Feb. 15 to May 15.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: While the pandemic will continue to kill thousands of Americans each day & prevent the full resumption of normal economic activity—as a result of the failures laid out in today’s report—the federal government is finally taking the steps necessary to begin ending this crisis.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Fortunately, the Biden Administration is already taking a dramatically different approach by leading a strong national response to the coronavirus crisis, consistent with the recommendations of GAO and the Select Subcommittee.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Perhaps most disturbingly, today’s report reveals that even after GAO made 27 different recommendations aimed at improving the response, the Trump Administration failed to implement them.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Today’s alarming report from the GAO provides further confirmation of what @COVIDOversight's investigations have made clear: the previous Administration’s coronavirus response failed across the board, exacerbating the pandemic’s toll of death, disease, and economic harm.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: If we hope to prevent catastrophic consequences of climate change, we must address the crisis NOW.   President Biden's Executive Actions on climate change are important steps to create good paying jobs, build sustainable infrastructure, & deliver environmental justice.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Today we remember the millions of lives, including 6 million Jews, that were lost during the Holocaust due to genocidal hatred.  The memory of the Holocaust must always drive us to prevent further atrocities. We must never forget. #HolocaustRemembranceDay

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: President Biden is making racial equity & fairness in America a priority of his Administration.  With just a week in office, he's already working to address past inequities.  I look forward to working together to make America's greatness accessible & affordable to all.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: In order for America to truly be great, we must ensure that its greatness is accessible and affordable for all.   Today, President Biden is issuing Executive Orders to advance equity by expanding fair housing, eliminating private prisons, and engaging with tribal nations.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: In order to rebuild our economy, we must support American businesses and American workers.   President Biden's latest Executive Order will direct the federal government to strengthen buy-American requirements for procuring goods and services.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Our military is strongest when all are welcome to serve based on their skills and qualifications—not barred because of their gender identity.   President Biden’s executive order rightly reverses the previous administration’s harmful ban on transgender Americans serving openly.

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Donald Trump’s incitement of the insurrection that sought to overturn a free and fair election was an existential threat to our constitutional democracy.   The Senate must extinguish this threat by convicting him and preventing him from attempting to seize power ever again.

name: James E. Clyburn

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: This pandemic has caused a dire economic crisis.   Today, President Biden is issuing an Executive Order to provide relief by expanding nutrition aid, delivering direct payments more effectively, and ensuring that no one is forced to risk their health to feed their family.

name: James E. Clyburn

name: James E. Clyburn

name: James E. Clyburn

name: James E. Clyburn

name: James E. Clyburn
tweet: Today’s announcement of the Biden-Harris Administration’s national plan to defeat the coronavirus and President Biden’s immediate executive actions to jumpstart this strategy are critical steps to help our nation finally get the coronavirus under control.

name: James E. Clyburn
